title: werneria pumila var. subspathulata
intro: Werneria pumila var. subspathulata, also known as a type of plant, is a variety of the Werneria pumila species, which is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Werneria pumila var. subspathulata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its role in improving immune function. Werneria pumila var. subspathulata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, for its medicinal uses.
